category_sources: source_facts.description says it reads and parses Word Perfect Graphics format.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides libwpg and source_facts.homepage is the official libwpg site.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official libwpg project site; the SourceForge project wiki is the official wiki documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage identifies the official SourceForge project, whose code browser is the official source-control surface.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Word Perfect Graphics parsing; source_facts.executables lists wpg2raw and wpg2svg.
